rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing 'with' clauses for package references
Ensure all package-qualified identifiers, data types, and property references are present in the analyzed model and its configured dependencies
generic_rules: Minimize repairs to only address validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Preserve existing component structure and connections when making repairs
Use only visible identifiers and valid AADL features in repairs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AADL package references require matching 'with' clauses
Generated AGREE code should not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new components or connections without explicit validator diagnostics
Do not modify component types or implementations beyond the current target component
